evals.prompt: Before coding, turn this rough feature idea into a spec with acceptance criteria: add team invite links to an existing SaaS app.
evals.expected_output: Uses spec-plan, checks for repository SPEC.md, retrieves relevant memory when useful, and outputs scope, acceptance criteria, validation plan, and execution plan.

evals.prompt: A test started failing after a refactor. Diagnose the root cause against the current spec and propose a fix-verify loop.
evals.expected_output: Uses spec-crlp, retrieves relevant memory, distinguishes evidence from assumptions, and outputs root cause, fix, validation, and memory to capture.

evals.prompt: Save this reusable root cause: auth middleware returns 401 in preview because required env vars are missing.
evals.expected_output: Uses spec-index, classifies as root-cause or setup, generates trigger tags, and creates or presents a normalized memory entry.
